mnemonics: Sparse Matrix: Store Only Non-Zero Elements (SONE)
Compressed Sparse Row: Count Row Pointers Carefully
keyPoints: A sparse matrix has mostly zero elements, making storage inefficient with standard 2D arrays.
Common representations include Compressed Sparse Row (CSR) and Compressed Sparse Column (CSC).
Sparse matrices are crucial for efficient computation in applications like graph algorithms and scientific computing.
commonMistakes: Using a 2D array for storage, wasting memory on zeros.
Incorrectly calculating the row pointer array indices in CSR format.
